status:
Commencement date was 20 February 2019 and Completion date was 20 February 2022. The revised Completion date is 21 October 2025. Interim Completion date was 31 December 2025.

As of January 2026, cumulative Physical Progress is at 91.38% against a Revised Planned Construction Progress of 100%. Revised Time progress was 100% of the original Contract and 100% of the revised interim extension of up to 31 December 2025 has since expired. Financial Progress was 90.055% of certified IPCs and 87.47% of Paid IPCs.
Alla and Gazi bridges were completed and closed at end of Defects Notification Period. 

Aca bridge
Main box culvert structure (3-cell, 4x3m) complete.
3No. Single cell 4x3 box culverts structures complete.
1No. 2 cell 1.5x1.5 box culvert complete
3No. one cell 1.5x1.5 box culverts complete
Pioneer gravel layer in the swamp section was complete.
Swamp treatment with rockfill was complete
Contractor has halted works due to delayed payment of IPCs. Three IPCs 32, 33 and 34 are in the process of payment. The Contractor has submitted claim for extension of time (EoT) which is under review

Challenges
Delayed payment of contractor’s IPCs leading to suspension of works and delays. The Contractor temporarily suspended works due to delayed payments and works are on hold.
Rains leading to floods on site and impassable roads to the borrow pits.
Electricity poles installed during the suspension period at Aca by Ministry of Energy that may delay works if poles interfere with roadworks.
